testcase.name: openSideBar

error.message: [public void end_to_end_testing.LoginHomeTest.openSideBar()] has no parameters defined but was found to be using a data provider (either explicitly specified or inherited from class level annotation). Data provider mismatch Method: openSideBar([]) Arguments: [(java.lang.String) problem_user,(java.lang.String) secret_sauce]
